description: Clone Chordinator repo, fetch ChordPro songs from GitHub, then run docker compose. Requires Docker already installed (run Chordinator-InstallDocker first).

ChordProRepo.description: Songs source repo (e.g. mattgraham/worship for OnSong, pcderic/chordpro for .cho)

ChordProMaxSongs.description: Max number of songs to fetch

ChordProBranch.description: Git branch (e.g. master for worship, main for chordpro)

runCommand: echo Fetching songs from {{ ChordProRepo }} (max {{ ChordProMaxSongs }}, .{{ ChordProExt }}, {{ ChordProBranch }})...

docker run --rm -v /home/ec2-user/the-chordinator:/app -w /app node:20-alpine node scripts/fetch-chordpro-from-github.mjs '{{ ChordProRepo }}' '{{ ChordProMaxSongs }}' '{{ ChordProExt }}' '{{ ChordProBranch }}' || echo 'Song fetch failed or skipped; continuing with build.'
echo No fetch script found; skipping ChordPro fetch.
echo Deploy complete. App should be on port 8080.
